title: Testing Object Collaborations and Contracts · Language Clinic: Oop Property Based Invariants
summary: Verify domain invariants, substitute implementations, event effects, persistence, and refactoring safety. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop property based invariants increment in a contract-tested object system. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Generate varied values and operation sequences to test invariants when examples cannot cover the state space.
Run one reusable behavior contract against every protocol, repository, or strategy implementation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
